mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fc_java.stadium order by rand() limit 1;
mapper.insert: insert into fc_java.sta_booking (b_ground_no, b_team_no, b_vs_team, b_won, b_date, b_tiem) values(#{b_ground_no}, #{b_team_no},#{b_vs_team}, #{b_won}, #{b_date}, #{b_time})
insert into fc_java.stadium (g_no, gmem_id, g_name, g_time, g_size, g_add, g_memo, g_img) values(#{g_no}, #{gmem_id}, #{g_name}, #{g_time}, #{g_size}, #{g_add}, #{g_memo}, #{g_img});
